untranslatable_reason: This signal requires real-time option Greeks (time value, implied volatility decay), dividend payment amounts, exercise prices, and option-specific derived metrics. These are not available in the standard price/technical indicator set. The rule depends on: (1) identifying remaining time value of a specific long call option, (2) comparing it to upcoming dividend amount, and (3) making an exercise decision—all of which require options pricing data (e.g., time decay, theta, dividend yield) and cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_114_0 is an options strategy rule requiring comparison of option Greeks and dividend schedules. The backtest engine would need: dividend calendar data, option chain data with Greeks, and position-level option Greeks tracking. This is operationally beyond pure price-action technical analysis.
